description.value: Aura moderate evocation; CL 6th Slot none; Weight -; Price 178 gp DESCRIPTION When propelled from a firearm, this +1 alchemical paper cartridge changes the damage to electricity damage. If the target takes electricity damage from the cartridge, it must succeed at a DC 14 Fortitude saving throw or be dazed for 1 round. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Magic Arms and Armor, lightning bolt; Cost 98 gp
